params.name: Father's Photo
params.source: You must shoot the Unknown Creature in front of your shrine with Incense 10 times in order to obtain the Father's Photo relic
params.description: On the back of this strange photo is some illegible handwriting. After identification by a linguist, it was said this text means father, that is how it got its name, and connoisseurs across the world regard it as exemplary avant-garde art, and it has become a precious piece of art collection.
